simplify.reason: Focused single-capability feature: the OR-gate is two literal branches (staticOK then dbLive) in one handler, not a pluggable provider seam; webinvite reuses the proven webcreds Repo/PostgresRepo/nil-guard shape; the invite UI reuses the spec-092 head/cardrewards-nav/foot chrome + .cr-table/.badge/.btn vocabulary. No duplication to extract.

gaps.reason: No coverage gap: SCN-093-01..19 map 1:1 to the webinvite unit + integration tests, the register OR-gate tests, the invite-UI handler tests, and the 20/20 e2e-ui journey; the DB-foundation double-spend gap is covered by TestWebInvite_ConcurrentConsume.

harden.reason: Spec/design/scopes already hardened by the analyst/ux/design/plan phases; the two finding-closure edits (docs/Development.md migration 058 row + scopes.md path-refs) are the only post-plan artifact changes and both are mechanically verified green.

stabilize.reason: No flakiness surface: deterministic Go unit/render tests + a real-PostgreSQL integration lane (the concurrent-consume race uses a start channel for determinism) + spec-077-fixtured e2e with real PRG forms (no time/network/ordering nondeterminism); full suite green on a fresh run.

chaos.reason: The chaos surface is single-use atomicity under concurrent consume (the TOCTOU a double-spend would exploit): TestWebInvite_ConcurrentConsume proves exactly-one-wins, re-proven live as SCN-3 (reuse of a consumed invite yields http=401, zero second account). No new fault-injection target (one additive migration, one repo, two route branches).

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the analyst phase authored the BDD spec.md and seeded state.json. Operator directive (verbatim): 'token need to be generated by admin in ui'. Later phases (ux/design/plan/implement/test/specialists) own their own artifacts.
executionHistory.note: Created specs/093-admin-generated-registration-invites/ with a complete BDD spec.md that evolves spec 091's invite-gated web self-registration so a logged-in operator GENERATES single-use, DB-backed, hashed-at-rest registration invites FROM THE WEB UI (instead of relying solely on the single static WEB_REGISTRATION_INVITE_TOKEN sops secret). GROUNDED against real source: web_register.go (spec-091 constant-time static gate + shared non-enumerating banner + no-cookie 303-to-/login?registered=1), config.go:524-530 (the static secret kept as bootstrap), auth_handlers.go:274-289 callerIsAdmin (per-user PASETO=always false, prod shared-token=false since ProductionSharedTokenFallbackEnabled defaults false => NO web-login user is admin in prod => MUST NOT gate behind callerIsAdmin), router.go:721-748 webAuthMiddleware + the /cards/admin mount (425-435) and cardrewards.go:193-196 AdminPage/AdminScrapeNow/AdminSyncCalendarNow (the binding authorization analog: generate/list/revoke sit behind webAuthMiddleware, consume stays public+rate-limited), the spec-044 admin_ui_static/tokens.html mint-show-once-list-revoke precedent (flagged: it uses inline script/style 'unsafe-inline' vs the CSP-clean register.html form-POST), webcreds/repo.go+hasher.go (argon2id for passwords; Repo/PostgresRepo/UserRow hash-excluded projection to mirror for the new invite repo), 044_web_user_credentials.sql migration pattern (high-water mark 057_card_rewards.sql => next 058), and 032_photo_reveal_tokens_secret_hash_and_toctou.sql (internal hashed-single-use-token TOCTOU precedent for the atomic consume). spec.md content: Problem (operator quote + the single-static-secret sops-surgery pain post-091-deploy), Goals (generate-in-UI one-time reveal / atomic single-use consume / list / revoke / zero spec-091 regression), Non-Goals (no email delivery, no multi-use, no RBAC, no static-secret retirement, no PASETO/cookie change), Domain Capability Model (Registration Invite primitive + outstanding->used|revoked|expired lifecycle + binding policies) with an AN5/G094 Single-Capability Justification (two concrete gate checks, NOT a provider/adapter family), MANDATORY Outcome Contract (Intent/Success Signal/Hard Constraints/Failure Condition), Actors, a BINDING Authorization Model section (webAuthMiddleware NOT callerIsAdmin, grounded in the callerIsAdmin switch + the /cards/admin precedent), UC-1..UC-10 Gherkin (generate-once / consume-atomic / reuse-rejected / expired-rejected / static-secret-still-works / generic-banner-non-enumerating / anon-rejected / list-metadata-only / revoke / spec-091-regression), AC-1..AC-11 (new web_registration_invites table+migration; Generate/Consume/List/Revoke repo; webAuthMiddleware UI; one-time hashed reveal; atomic single-use UPDATE...WHERE used_at IS NULL guard; OR-gate accepting DB-invite OR static secret; non-enumerating value-safe failure; anon-reject; metadata-only list; zero regression; NO-DEFAULTS SST), Security Model, Referenced Existing Surfaces (all paths above), six Open Design Decisions handed to design/ux (a hash SHA-256 vs argon2id; b TTL none-vs-default; c UI placement /admin/invites vs /cards/admin; d CSP-clean form-POST vs tokens.html unsafe-inline; e keep static secret as bootstrap -> analyst recommends YES; f consume+create atomicity boundary), Out-of-Scope Anti-Patterns, Dependencies, Release Train mvp, UI Scenario Matrix (M1-M8), and Non-Functional Requirements. PostgreSQL-only, PII-safe placeholders, value-safe (plaintext never logged). state.json seeded status=in_progress (NOT done), releaseTrain mvp, workflowMode full-delivery, schema mirrored from specs/092-card-rewards-ui-elevation/state.json. certification seeded pending (NOT promoted) per analyst boundary. Did NOT author design/scopes/report/uservalidation; did NOT implement or commit. Next required owner: bubbles.ux.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the UX phase folded the wireframe + interaction-flow spec into spec.md (single file, no sidecar) and resolved the two UX-owned open design decisions.
executionHistory.note: Appended ## UX Specification + ## UI Wireframes + ## User Flows to spec.md (single-file; no ux.md/wireframes.md/flows.md sidecar). RESOLVED open decision (c) UI placement = a dedicated GET /cards/admin/invites page mounted in the SAME webAuthMiddleware group as /cards/admin (NOT callerIsAdmin), reachable via an 'Account Invites ->' btn-secondary link on /cards/admin, rendered with the shared spec-092 cardrewards-nav (Admin pill active) + a 'Back to Admin' crosslink; rationale = separable account-access concern that inherits correct authz for free and is discoverable without adding a new nav pill. RESOLVED open decision (d) CSP/interaction shape = CSP-clean server-rendered <form>-POST surface (mirrors spec-091 register.html + spec-092 strict script-src 'self'), NO inline <script>/onclick/onsubmit, NO 'unsafe-inline' (rejects the spec-044 tokens.html fetch() approach); revoke = pure Post/Redirect/Get (303 -> GET list); GENERATE = Post -> render-once (HTTP 200 direct render, NOT a redirect) because the one-time plaintext must never travel via a redirect Location/query/flash/log (value-safety) so the plaintext appears ONLY in that one response body, never in the list/hash/refetch. Wireframes (ASCII, desktop + mobile): Account Invites list, one-time reveal callout (role=status, focusable readonly token input, Ctrl/Cmd-A+C copy, JS-free), empty state, CSS-only <details> revoke-confirm, error/race alert-warning banner, the /cards/admin entry-link modify, and the UNCHANGED spec-091 /register screen (same invite-token field now accepting a DB invite OR the static secret). 4 mermaid user flows (generate->reveal->handoff, register/consume, revoke, anon blocked). UI Primitives (UX9): reused spec-092 .cr-table/.badge/.card/.alert/.btn/.empty-state/focus-rings + 3 new composition primitives (invite status-badge mapping outstanding=info/used=success/expired=warning/revoked=danger with glyph+word, one-time reveal callout, CSS-only revoke-confirm). Accessibility: bound labels, role=status reveal + role=alert errors, keyboard-reachable JS-free copy, accessible revoke confirm, visible focus, color-never-sole-signal, works without JS, >=44px touch targets, responsive. LEFT OPEN (design-owned): (a) hash algo, (b) TTL, (e) keep static secret, (f) consume/create atomicity. Did NOT create design.md/scopes.md, did NOT implement code, did NOT commit, did NOT mark done. Next required owner: bubbles.design.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the design phase authored design.md (technical design) and settled the four design-owned open decisions plus the template-placement + route-shape ambiguities. Did NOT write scopes.md, implement code, or change status. Next required owner: bubbles.plan.
executionHistory.note: Authored specs/093-.../design.md GROUNDED against real source (web_register.go gate-first flow + registerGateBanner + logRegisterReject + no-cookie 303; webcreds Repo/PostgresRepo/UpsertPassword/Hash/MinPasswordLength=12/ErrUserExists; cardrewards.go CardRewardsWebHandler + SetTriggers late-wire idiom + RegisterRoutes /cards/admin block; cardrewards_templates.go head/cardrewards-nav/foot defines keyed off .Title; router.go webAuthMiddleware group mounting CardRewardsWebHandler.RegisterRoutes + the public rate-limited /register block; health.go Dependencies struct; wiring.go wireCardRewardsHandler nil-pool guard + webcreds/invite-token wiring; migration high-water 057 => 058; 019_expense_tracking.sql id TEXT PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text convention; 032 TOCTOU hashed-single-use precedent; auth.SessionFromContext for created_by; web/pwa/tests/_support/csp.ts attachCSPGuard for the spec-077 guard). SETTLED design-owned decisions: (a) hash = SHA-256 (hex) of the raw token, by-hash indexed lookup, NOT argon2id (high-entropy secret => fast crypto hash is correct; slow KDF is for low-entropy passwords), plain SHA-256 (no HMAC), token gen = inv_ + base64.RawURLEncoding(crypto/rand 32B), store hex(sha256(plaintext)); constant-time non-issue documented (DB branch is an indexed digest lookup, not a byte compare; both branches converge on the byte-identical generic banner). (b) TTL = optional expiry, v1 default 7 days at generation, expires_at nullable (NULL=never), consume+gate guards check (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()); UI expiry picker deferred per UX. (c) [UX-resolved, restated] dedicated GET /cards/admin/invites in the webAuthMiddleware group, Admin pill active. (d) [UX-resolved, restated] CSP-clean form-POST; generate = POST /cards/admin/invites -> HTTP 200 render-once (NOT a redirect, value-safety); revoke = POST /cards/admin/invites/{id}/revoke -> 303 PRG; RECONCILED the route to POST /cards/admin/invites (UX binding) NOT /cards/admin/invites/generate (prompt paraphrase). (e) KEEP the static WEB_REGISTRATION_INVITE_TOKEN as bootstrap; OR-gate, static checked first (constant-time, cheap), DB invite second; ONLY the DB-invite branch consumes (static path uses unchanged UpsertPassword, marks nothing used). (f) ONE pgx.Tx wraps the guarded consume UPDATE...RETURNING id + the account INSERT; webinvite.PostgresRepo owns the pool+tx via ConsumeAndCreate(ctx,hash,usedBy,onClaimed func(ctx,tx)error); webcreds gains a free function HashAndInsertTx (NOT on the Repo interface => zero interface/fake churn) mapping 23505 -> ErrUserExists; duplicate username => rollback => invite NOT consumed => duplicate banner; a non-mutating IsLive gate-read mirrors staticOK so spec-091 specific field banners stay valid-token-only (the guarded UPDATE remains the single-use authority; race collapses to ConsumeInvalid => generic banner). TEMPLATE-PLACEMENT decision: internal/web package; handlers = methods on the EXISTING CardRewardsWebHandler in a new internal/web/invites.go; templates = const cardRewardsInviteTemplates in new internal/web/invites_templates.go parsed in NewCardRewardsWebHandler (inherits head/nav/foot chrome + FuncMap, zero duplication, zero shared-template edits); webinvite.Repo late-wired via a new SetInvites setter (mirrors SetTriggers, constructor+interface unchanged); view model sets Title=Admin to light the Admin nav pill with no chrome edit. Specified: migration 058_web_registration_invites.sql full DDL (id TEXT PK gen_random_uuid()::text, token_hash TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, label, created_by, created_at, expires_at, used_at, used_by, revoked_at; commented; NO plaintext column); internal/auth/webinvite/repo.go (Repo interface + PostgresRepo + InviteRow metadata-only projection + InviteStatus/ConsumeOutcome/RevokeOutcome enums + exported HashToken + nil-guard NewPostgresRepo); the 3 admin handlers + the web_register.go OR-gate modification (full control-flow); router wiring (sub-route inside the existing /cards/admin webAuthMiddleware block => NO router.go change) + the /cards/admin Account-Invites-> link; wiring.go fan-out (deps.WebInvites + webHandler.SetInvites) with nil-pool behavior; Dependencies gains WebInvites field; Security Model table; DE4 capability-foundation note + ### Single-Implementation Justification (G094 heading shape); Complexity Tracking (4 justified deviations); and a scenario->test-type mapping covering UC-1..UC-10 + atomic-concurrency + duplicate-rollback + CSP guard + live deploy proof. NO Open Questions remain. Did NOT run check (no symbol/migration-number doubt remained after grounding). Did NOT write scopes.md/implement/commit. Status stays in_progress; certification.* untouched.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the plan phase authored scopes.md (4 scopes, single-file) + the report.md evidence skeleton + uservalidation.md ([x] baseline) + scenario-manifest.json (19 scenarios) and updated state.json. Did NOT implement code, commit, or change status. Next required owner: bubbles.implement starting SCOPE-01.
executionHistory.note: Authored specs/093-.../scopes.md as a 4-scope single-file DAG (01 -> {02, 03} -> 04) refined from design.md. SCOPE-01 = the shared data foundation: migration 058_web_registration_invites.sql (id TEXT PK gen_random_uuid()::text per 019; token_hash TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE; label/created_by/created_at/expires_at/used_at/used_by/revoked_at; NO plaintext column) + the new internal/auth/webinvite package (HashToken=hex(sha256), Generate=inv_+base64.RawURLEncoding(crypto/rand 32B) with 7-day default TTL, IsLive non-mutating gate read, ConsumeAndCreate one pgx.Tx guarded UPDATE...RETURNING id + onClaimed callback, List metadata-only, Revoke guarded, NewPostgresRepo nil-guard) + webcreds.HashAndInsertTx free function (23505->ErrUserExists, UpsertPassword unchanged). SCOPE-02 = /register OR-gate (staticOK constant-time OR dbLive via IsLive; disabled fail-loud; only the DB branch consumes via ConsumeAndCreate+HashAndInsertTx; duplicate username rolls back so invite stays unconsumed) + Dependencies.WebInvites field + cmd/core/wiring.go fan-out; internal/api/router.go UNCHANGED. SCOPE-03 = admin invites UI as methods on the existing CardRewardsWebHandler (internal/web/invites.go AdminInvitesPage/AdminInviteGenerate(200 render-once)/AdminInviteRevoke(303 PRG)/SetInvites/sessionIdentity + invites_templates.go reusing head/cardrewards-nav/foot, token only on the reveal template), /invites sub-route inside the existing /cards/admin webAuthMiddleware block, /cards/admin 'Account Invites ->' link, CSP-clean. SCOPE-04 = consolidated verification + live home-lab deploy proof (migration 058 on deploy; generate->register->used->reuse-rejected). Each scope: Status=Not Started, Depends On DAG, Gherkin traced to spec UCs (SCN-093-01..19), Implementation Plan citing exact files/symbols from design.md, a Test Plan table with one row per test-related DoD checkbox (parity 9/9, 7/7, 7/7, 5/5 = 28 rows/28 items), and a Tiered DoD (Core Items + grouped Build Quality Gate). UI Scenario Matrix added in SCOPE-03 (UI changes). No box pre-checked; status unchanged (in_progress); no code, no commit, no done. DE4/G094: design.md has the ## Capability-Foundation Note + ### Single-Implementation Justification headings (single webinvite.PostgresRepo, two literal gate branches, NOT a provider seam) so SCOPE-01 is an ordinary data foundation, NOT foundation:true; no overlay scopes. Recorded artifact-lint result in the result envelope.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the implement phase delivered SCOPE-01, SCOPE-02, and SCOPE-03 to full DoD with raw inline evidence per item in report.md. Did NOT touch SCOPE-04 (consolidated verify + live deploy — owned by bubbles.test) and did NOT flip the spec status to done. Next required owner: bubbles.test for SCOPE-04.
executionHistory.note: Implemented SCOPE-01 (migration 058_web_registration_invites.sql hash-only table + internal/auth/webinvite package [HashToken hex-sha256, Generate inv_+base64url(32B), IsLive, ConsumeAndCreate one-tx guarded UPDATE...RETURNING + onClaimed, List metadata-only, Revoke, NewPostgresRepo nil-guard] + webcreds.HashAndInsertTx free function [23505->ErrUserExists, UpsertPassword + Repo interface unchanged]); SCOPE-02 (web_register.go OR-gate staticOK-first/dbLive-second/disabled-fail-loud + Step-7 atomic DB-invite branch via ConsumeAndCreate+HashAndInsertTx + Dependencies.WebInvites + wiring fan-out; logRegisterReject + router.go UNCHANGED); SCOPE-03 (internal/web/invites.go 3 handlers + SetInvites + sessionIdentity + view models, invites_templates.go chrome-reusing list/reveal/shared-table with token only on reveal, /invites sub-route in the existing /cards/admin webAuthMiddleware block, /cards/admin Account Invites link, CSP-clean). Evidence (all ./smackerel.sh): test unit --go (3 webinvite + 5 HashAndInsertTx + 5 OrGate/NonEnumerating + 15 AdminInvite* subtests PASS); test integration --go-run TestWebInvite (8 PASS) + TestWebRegisterIntegration (4 PASS) against live Postgres with migration 058; test e2e-ui cardrewards (20 PASS incl. the SCN-093 journey + spec-092 regression + spec-077 CSP). Honest deviations in report.md: DB-backed integration tests live in tests/integration/ (the curated go-integration allowlist excludes internal/auth & internal/api; design file paths were indicative); the anonymous-block Go test uses a faithful group-gate (internal/web imports internal/api, so an in-package api test would cycle) with the REAL webAuthMiddleware proven live by the e2e-ui SCN-093-16 step; the e2e-ui core image was a stale 8h-old project image so it was rebuilt before the passing run. lint + format --check + artifact-lint all exit 0; value-safe (invites handler ZERO slog calls; logRegisterReject logs only username_len+reason). Did NOT commit; did NOT touch SCOPE-04. Next owner: bubbles.test.

This finalization recorded SCOPE-04 (consolidated verification + live deploy proof) Done and ran the remaining full-delivery verification ceremony. Fresh this-session evidence: full Go unit suite GREEN (./smackerel.sh test unit --go: every package ok incl. the now-closed F-093-R1 internal/docfreshness + F-093-R2 internal/scopesdriftguard meta-gates); ./smackerel.sh check + lint + format --check + artifact-lint.sh all exit 0; value-safe slog scan (invites.go + webinvite repo make ZERO slog calls).
